## UX Issue Summary
<!-- Describe the usability or design problem you encountered. -->

## Page / Section Affected
<!-- Which page or section of the site? e.g. Hero, Navigation, CTA, Footer -->

## What Were You Trying to Do?
<!-- Describe the task or goal you were attempting. -->

## What Made It Difficult?
<!-- What specifically was confusing, hard to find, or broken in terms of UX? -->

## Suggested Improvement
<!-- How would you improve it? Feel free to describe or sketch a solution. -->

## Device & Context
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Desktop]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari, Chrome]
- Screen size: [e.g. mobile, tablet, desktop]

## Screenshots / Recordings
